rationale: Budget refreshed to match current detector surface (18 detectors, was 8 at v1). Current total: 2405. Budget set to current + small grace (~5%) to absorb minor churn without immediate re-baseline. Tighten over time as: (1) stale-code archived/_archived dirs get deleted (Phase 4), (2) observability-gap medium findings get logger calls added (Phase 5), (3) env-config-drift gets normalized via the .env.example audit. The per-detector budget below also got refreshed to match v18 detector set — previously only 8 detectors had budgets configured which led to silent overflow from the 10 newer detectors that landed in subsequent sprints.
